html:
European Commission, Daily News, Brussels, June 30, 2026.

The Commission is disbursing €3.9 billion for drones as part of the €90 billion support package for Ukraine.

Today marks the beginning of the disbursement of €3.9 billion from the European Commission, which...
tldr: The EU is investing €3.9 billion to purchase drones for Ukraine. The funds are coming from a larger loan established to provide support to the country.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the executive branch of the EU, has begun disbursing funds to purchase drones for Ukraine. The amount being disbursed is €3.9 billion.

These funds are drawn from a larger loan of €90 billion that the EU has provided to Ukraine. The purpose of this loan is to provide support to the country in its current situation.

This decision means that significant sums of money are being used to acquire technology, such as drones. This is part of the broader collaborative effort within the EU to assist Ukraine.
